title: Stop Trading Direction — Pair Trading Is the Edge
summary_title: Pair Protocol's 45% basket trading shift and Agent Pair's proprietary data advantage
summary_description: Huff on long-short pair trading, crypto VCs becoming hedge funds, and AI agents for relative value.

key_moments.label: Huff's background: trading floors in London, then crypto fund management
Pair Protocol explained: long one asset, short another to profit on relative performance
Basket trading now 50%+ of volume; people trading thematic pairs like Hype vs Total2
Weighted ratio feature lets you chart and trade at custom weightings, not just 50-50
Agent Pair Phase 3: Telegram app with natural language execution and proprietary stat library
Pair API enables builders and hedge funds to integrate pair trading into their own products
Crypto VCs pivoting to liquid token funds, then long-short positioning like hedge funds
Pair token: 40% fee discount for holders, 70% revenue buyback, moving to Hyperliquid spot

pull_quote: Borrowed conviction isn't a good thing. You will sell too early, close too early, mismanage it, never size it correctly.
